Succession Planning

CEO

ConglomerateIT places Chief Executive Succession candidates that transform organizations — research-led search with global reach and a 97% client satisfaction score.

ConglomerateIT's Succession Planning practice specializes in Chief Executive Succession placements. Our research-led methodology combines deep talent market mapping, rigorous competency assessment, and confidential outreach to deliver candidates who not only have the right skills — but the right cultural fit and leadership style for your organization.

Get Started
Global Talent Mapping
Competency-Based Assessment
Cultural Fit Evaluation
Confidential Search Process
Reference Verification
Offer Management
Onboarding Support
12-Month Guarantee

Why Choose Us

Built for Real Results

97% Client Satisfaction

Our track record speaks for itself — 97% of clients rate our search delivery as excellent, and 85% return for subsequent searches.

Global Reach

Access to leadership talent across North America, EMEA, APAC, and India — wherever the best person for your role is located.

Speed Without Compromise

Average 8-12 week search timelines without sacrificing quality — our pre-existing talent relationships accelerate delivery.

Assessment Rigour

Structured interviews, psychometric assessment, and 360-degree reference checks for every shortlisted candidate.

Industry Expertise

Sector-specialist consultants who understand the nuances of leadership in your industry — not generalists.

Placement Guarantee

12-month replacement guarantee on all permanent placements — your investment is protected.
